omitted_declarations.policy_reference: We may also collect sensitive personal data, such as information about your racial or ethnic origin, political opinions, religious or philosophical beliefs, trade union membership, and data concerning your health, sex life, or sexual orientation. We will only collect this information where it is necessary for the purposes of providing our services to you and where we have your explicit consent to do so.
